book.destination: restaurant that the user will book
book.departure: accommodation that the user will book

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a place to stay. The hotel should be in the north and should have a star of 4
The hotel should be in the moderate price range and should include free parking
Once you find the hotel you want to book it for 4 people and 2 nights starting from monday
Make sure you get the reference number
You are also looking for a place to dine. The restaurant should be in the same area as the hotel and should serve chinese food
Once you find the restaurant you want to book a table for the same group of people at 15:00 on the same day
Make sure you get the reference number
You also want to book a taxi to commute between the two places
You want to make sure it arrives the restaurant by the booked time
Make sure you get contact number and car type
